title: Detail from Rebuild of Evangelion 10
wikitext:
[]: Detail from Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0             Quote Post by n2eva » Sat Jun 29, 2019 10:28 pm The face of an Angel (Lillith?) can quickly be seen when Shinji loses consciousness during his first battle. If looked at frame by frame you'll see it within the LCL bubbling, towards the upper right, before his train dream.

[]: Re: Detail from Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0             Quote Post by Krikenemp » Fri Aug 02, 2019 6:51 pm Are you referring to this? SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Detail from Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Aug 03, 2019 5:04 am It looks like LCL/Blood to me. It seems like you have Pareidolia when it comes to that scene/image.
